overview: The strongest supportive currents come through Shani. Mixed stretches are shaped by Guru and Rahu and Ketu and need timing awareness.
yearlyTheme: In the Sri Parabhava year (from March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027), Vruschika Rasi natives will experience favorable and auspicious results for the majority of the year due to the influence of Jupiter.
opportunities: In the Sri Parabhava year (from March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027), Vruschika Rasi natives will experience favorable and auspicious results for the majority of the year due to the influence of Jupiter. Until December 4, 2026, the influence is somewhat unfavorable, leading to frequent obstacles in your endeavors and delays in completing tasks.
caution: While efforts to relocate or change your residence will be successful, you must exercise extreme caution regarding valuable documents and jewelry between the 11th and 15th. For the elderly, caution is advised regarding bone-related health issues.
studiesCareer: Financial stability improves as pending dues finally reach you, and those involved in government contracts or seeking public sector employment will see significant progress and gains. In this month, all types of business dealings will proceed as expected, resulting in favorable financial gains.

The third week brings promising new opportunities and an improvement in family members' health, with your spouse’s advice proving particularly beneficial.
healthWellbeing: Those aspiring for children should seek both divine grace and medical guidance, as women of this sign may face pregnancy-related health challenges. blessing: Overall, in the Sri Parabhava year, Vruschika Rasi natives will not face severe adverse effects from any of the planets

planetaryInfluences.summary: In the Sri Parabhava year (from March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027), Vruschika Rasi natives will experience favorable and auspicious results for the majority of the year due to the influence of Jupiter.

For Vruschika Rasi natives, the influence of Saturn in the Sri Parabhava year is generally favorable across most sectors, with the notable exception of matters related to progeny. Those aspiring for children should seek both divine grace and medical guidance, as women of this sign may face pregnancy-related health challenges. Financially, however, Saturn promises significant wealth and prosperity throughout the year. While the youth might occasionally struggle with confusion or regret over the past, it is important to note that Vruschika Rasi remains entirely free from the influence of Elinati Shani (Sade Sati) during this period.

In the Sri Parabhava year, Rahu will yield mixed results for Vruschika Rasi natives. Until December 4, 2026, the influence is somewhat unfavorable, leading to frequent obstacles in your endeavors and delays in completing tasks. During this period, recovering lent money or outstanding dues may prove difficult, and concerns regarding the health or well-being of maternal relatives may arise. However, a significant positive shift occurs from December 5, 2026, until the end of the year. During this latter half, Rahu bestows highly favorable outcomes, bringing good fortune in terms of wealth and assets, and enabling you to lead a comfortable and prosperous life.

For Vruschika Rasi natives, the influence of Ketu in the Sri Parabhava year will result in mixed outcomes throughout the year. You will experience a fluctuating period where moments of progress and prosperity are balanced by certain losses. However, those whose personal horoscopes lack the inherent strength of Ketu may face more consistent negative effects from this planet during the year.

monthlyHighlights.summary: In this month, you will find relief from several long-standing issues, leading to a much-needed sense of peace within your family life. Financial stability improves as pending dues finally reach you, and those involved in government contracts or seeking public sector employment will see significant progress and gains. While efforts to relocate or change your residence will be successful, you must exercise extreme caution regarding valuable documents and jewelry between the 11th and 15th. The third week brings promising new opportunities and an improvement in family members' health, with your spouse’s advice proving particularly beneficial. Ultimately, the month concludes on a high note, with all planned tasks and projects proceeding smoothly toward completion.

In this month, all types of business dealings will proceed as expected, resulting in favorable financial gains. However, this is not an ideal time for young couples to pursue efforts regarding progeny. While your overall income remains moderate, you will gain a deeper appreciation for the value of money and manage it wisely. In your professional life, the challenges faced due to colleagues will finally be resolved, allowing new projects to move forward rapidly. You will successfully implement innovative ideas and find yourself in a position to guide and discipline others effectively. Domestic responsibilities will be fulfilled completely, and you may notice positive changes in your physical well-being. By overlooking minor flaws in your spouse and practicing forgiveness, you will maintain harmony in your marital life. Your heightened intuition will allow you to understand others' feelings easily, helping you recognize and befriend virtuous people. Please be cautious, as the 15th, 18th, 25th, 26th, and 27th of this month are not favorable dates.

In this month, your income will be quite good, providing a strong financial footing. While you may encounter minor family tensions due to maternal relatives, you will enjoy excellent comforts and quality food throughout the period. Business affairs will proceed as expected, and you may even find yourself in a position to provide livelihood opportunities to new individuals. For the elderly, caution is advised regarding bone-related health issues. Job seekers or those looking for a career change—especially those born under the Anuradha Nakshatra—will find success in their efforts. You are likely to hear auspicious news regarding your close kin and will spend time planning for the long-term welfare of your family. Your soft-spoken nature will be your greatest asset, helping you get things done through others smoothly. The third week is particularly favorable for purchasing new items or jewelry, but exercise extreme caution in the final week, as negative associations or gambling could lead to losses. For starting any new ventures, the 4th, 9th, 11th, and 25th are the most favorable dates.

In this month, your income continues to remain strong, and new business ventures will yield the expected profits. Professionals in the fields of law or psychology will achieve significant fame and recognition for their services. You will be able to speak with great clarity and eloquence, earning a reputation for having vast knowledge across all subjects. While you will be inclined toward charity and noble deeds, be prepared for some unfavorable changes within the family environment. Exercise caution during travels on the second and third Saturdays, as there are indications of potential financial losses. Although you will provide excellent advice to others, you may find yourself lacking the time to implement it in your own life. The final week of the month brings substantial gains, particularly through international industries, and may mark the beginning of a high-authority career position. While you will successfully acquire a vehicle of your choice, you must be extremely careful with new acquaintances, as they could lead to personal complications or long-term health issues.

In this month, your income remains strong, yet you may experience a sense of unrest in your personal life. Individuals born under the Visakha Nakshatra will find success in their efforts to move or work abroad, while others in professional roles will see more moderate results. Business affairs continue to show expected progress, and you will find yourself drawn toward traditional customs and cultural practices. While you will be deeply focused on your children’s upbringing and earn the trust of those around you, efforts to secure bank loans or additional funding may face obstacles. You might find yourself providing shelter or support to close relatives and friends during this time. For women, this month brings the opportunity to gain new expertise in the culinary arts. However, young women should exercise extreme caution as a lack of worldly experience could lead to deceptive situations. It is advisable to avoid any risky or adventurous activities this month. Between the 24th and 27th, you will enjoy joyful moments with loved ones and partake in delicious, wholesome meals at home. For the elderly, the month promises a comfortable and peaceful period.

In this month, you will encounter promising new opportunities, and obstacles related to visa processes or travel documents will finally be cleared. While results in your job or business may remain moderate, you will likely spend money on renovation or structural changes to your home. The second week brings sudden profits for the business community, as your innovative ideas begin to yield results. During the third week, both your earnings and expenditures will be high, requiring careful financial management. By the final week, you will be successful in recovering long-standing debts or old loans. For those planning important ventures, the 8th, 9th, and 10th of this month are exceptionally favorable and will bring positive outcomes for all your efforts.

In this month, marital conflicts will be resolved, leading to improved comfort and harmony in your personal life. New ventures in business will prove profitable, though your overall income is expected to remain moderate. You will find it easy to fulfill your domestic responsibilities; however, the youth should be cautious not to waste valuable time on unproductive activities. In your professional life, successfully completing major tasks on time will earn you the appreciation of your superiors, creating a vibrant and encouraging work environment. By mid-month, you will likely participate in festive gatherings and social celebrations. It is important to note that this period may not be as favorable for those born under the Jyeshtha Nakshatra, particularly as efforts to find new sources of income may not yield results. Please be mindful that the 13th, 19th, 21st, 29th, and 30th are not favorable dates for important activities.

In this month, you may face disputes with paternal relatives regarding ancestral property or real estate matters. Business owners should be prepared for some inconveniences or hurdles related to government departments, and there is a risk of facing betrayal or breach of trust from friends. On a positive note, parents will enjoy a wonderful rapport with their children, and the guidance or support of elders will lead to significant growth in your professional life. You will make decisions that bring permanent benefits to your family and successfully establish long-term financial security. It is crucial to maintain a simple appearance and avoid harshness in your speech; failing to do so could lead to setbacks in your career. Around the 11th, 12th, and 13th, be extremely cautious about your diet, as consuming unhygienic food may lead to health issues. Additionally, avoid criticizing or blaming others when meeting new people, as this could unnecessarily invite trouble. Finally, it is advisable not to take any major decisions on the 29th and 30th of this month.

In this month, you will experience mixed circumstances in your daily life, though your financial income remains strong. Opportunities for gains through gold or real estate are indicated, but you must be wary of impulsive actions, as they could lead to accidents or setbacks. Your desire to keep everyone under your control may create unnecessary friction and difficulties in your social circle. Women born under Vruschika Rasi should be particularly cautious of conspiracies, as there is a risk of losing either their livelihood or valuable relationships; health issues may also pose a challenge for them this month. While the workload in your professional life will be heavy, you will successfully achieve your goals through self-effort during the third and final weeks. A long-standing problem will finally be resolved with the support of distant relatives, making it an essential time to show sincere gratitude to those who help you. It is advisable to avoid boasting in areas where you lack expertise, and be aware that legal or court-related matters are not favorable during this period.

In this month, you will find opportunities to acquire new property, and for those who are unmarried, promising matrimonial alliances are likely to be finalized. While your income remains moderate, you will demonstrate exceptional leadership and efficiency in managing the organizations or teams under your direction. Your business acumen will be at its peak; however, you may find yourself increasingly inclined toward your community or traditional roots. It is advisable to avoid travel, as journeys may be strenuous and unproductive. You might feel overwhelmed and irritable due to taking on too much responsibility yourself. The period between the 22nd and 27th is particularly unfavorable, with risks of loss of reputation or severe complications arising from bad habits or negative friendships. You may also find yourself performing ancestral rites or family obligations this month. In your eagerness for quick solutions, be cautious about relying on mediators, as they may lead to potential losses.

In this month, the results are not very favorable as your expenditures are likely to exceed your income. You may find it difficult to translate your ideas into actions, and financial hurdles will persist throughout the period. In family matters, your children may be reluctant to listen to your advice and might remain stubborn in their opinions. You may find yourself in situations where you must depend on the cooperation of others. Individuals born under Visakha Nakshatra should be particularly careful, as a narrow-minded approach could lead to personal losses. It is important to realize that superficial knowledge or impractical philosophies will only hinder your progress; relying on your own true capabilities is the best way forward. From the 21st onwards, you will see some relief in your financial situation. However, those working in the medical or pharmaceutical fields will face a highly challenging environment this month. The month concludes on a spiritual note, with opportunities for visiting sacred pilgrimage sites.

In this month, conditions will gradually improve, making it an excellent time for new job searches, real estate investments, and discussions with siblings. You will receive significant recognition for your work, and a positive shift in your perspective will occur; you will begin to realize that every living being has a unique place in nature and that every life offers a valuable lesson. You will actively strive to create a harmonious atmosphere among family members. Spiritual seekers, however, must exercise patience during this period. There is a high probability that all tasks initiated this month will be completed successfully. You will also encounter individuals who truly understand your feelings and perspectives. The business environment remains favorable, and with the introduction of new friends, your plans for business expansion will gain momentum and move forward.

In this final month of the Sri Parabhava year, you will experience mixed results. While your income remains strong, you may find yourself struggling with a lack of mental peace and situations that test your inner strength and confidence. Fortunately, the support and encouragement of your spouse will provide a much-needed boost to your spirits. You must be careful not to act impulsively, as sudden outbursts could lead to self-created problems and increased physical strain. This is not the time for overconfidence; instead, exercise caution in your planning. You will feel a strong desire to handle all tasks independently without relying on others. Be wary of fabricated stories or misleading information from mediators, as believing them could cause you to miss out on excellent opportunities. It is highly recommended that you personally investigate all matters and rely on your own judgment before making any decisions.

notes: OCR used page 1 of the local PDF capture.
Match status is based on heading, available metrics, available annual section markers, and first month marker.
